summary: Russian operators from the Rubicon Center destroyed 144 Ukrainian targets on April 4, 2026, including personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and UAV control points across the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. In a separate incident, two Russian "Yolka" air defense drones simultaneously intercepted an enemy fixed-wing UAV using kinetic strikes. Ukrainian forces conducted coordinated strikes on April 2 against Crimean military targets, destroying an Orion-type UAV storage facility, an aircraft, and a radar station. Meanwhile, Russian forces dropped fake money with QR codes over border areas using Geran-2 drones as a psychological operation, and Ukrainian electronic warfare successfully disrupted Russian FPV drone operations with verbal interference.
